BREAKING: 31% of all hospice and home health companies in the U.S. are registered in L.A. County, and they receive millions in taxpayer money.

So I went to the addresses listed in the Valley.

What I found: No clinics. No patients. No healthcare providers.

Just vacant offices.

posts.author: rdvs34283
posts.title: Tax dollars come with a basic expectation: service to the public. Then why do state schools bankroll people who despise the state? Free speech requires tolerating ideas that are foolish, offensive, or absurd. But the First Amendment does not require taxpayers to finance those ideas.

link_metadata.description: Tax dollars come with a basic expectation: service to the public. Professors who sneer at that public shouldn’t be shocked when the public pushes back.
